body: Why is the notification toggle button on Geph greyed out? When using Geph as a VPN, notifications for Telegram, WhatsApp, and other apps do not work until I open the apps. Why does Geph disable background push notifications for these apps?

title: 是否能增加一个白名单模式
author: Flaneur2023
body: 已有的“排除应用程序”无法检测出系统应用，使用自带的应用商店、搜索等需要联网的系统应用时仍处于代理状态，需要先断开连接

title: Feature Request: Option to Include Specific Applications for Proxy Connection
author: nifengtang
body:
Dear [App Developer/Support Team],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to suggest an enhancement to your application, which currently functions as a proxy app with the capability to exclude certain applications from using the proxy. While this feature is useful, I believe it would be greatly beneficial to also provide an option to include specific applications for proxy connection.

Currently, the exclusion list does not cover all the applications I need to manage, and having an inclusion option would allow users to explicitly select which applications should use the proxy. This would offer greater flexibility and control, ensuring that the desired applications can connect to the network through the proxy without any issues.

I believe this feature would enhance the user experience and make the application more versatile for various use cases. Thank you for considering this suggestion. I look forward to any updates or feedback you may have.

Best regards,
Danny

title: It's not a whole list in exclude apps page
author: nifengtang
body: I suggest you adding an option in setting page to allow users add include apps,  Which will transfer data through vpn.  Not only an option for exclude apps, And also your option for exclude apps is included mistakes,  For example, There is no system apps in the list, And you should allow users to save the options  they selected by  Go back to the main page of your app,  Not a very end ok button on the bottom of this page.  That means you should allow users to save the selection by a "back".   Or at least  Appear in option for  Save  &  Discard.  while users will leaving this list page.

title: Add options: bypass every apps, let geph working as proxy server only.
author: ghost
body:
Add options: bypass every apps, let geph working as proxy server only.
For some security reason, we can not using geph as the finally exit node.

we need two hop or more than 3 hop jump .
so we need run geph as a standalone proxy mode,
Like tor for android.

title: 建议自动推荐用户名
author: ghost
body: 注册账户时可能发现用户名已被注册，建议自动推荐尚未注册的用户名。

title: 建议学习Invizible
author: ghost
body: [https://github.com/Gedsh/InviZible](https://github.com/Gedsh/InviZible) 可以开VPN，但是VPN经过localhost的前置代理；而且自带防火墙，控制应用联网。

title: 安卓端能否提供仅代理模式？
author: ghost
body: 仅代理模式就是不开VPN，而是在localhost的某个端口运行代理；方便搭建多重代理。如果第一层代理已经是VPN了，那么开第二个VPN直接杀死第一层VPN，毕竟安卓手机很难实现电脑的虚拟机，运行Limbo的某些特性甚至需要root权限。因为再开一个VPN要杀死第一个VPN，所以需要仅代理模式，这样才构造至少双重代理，再开一个Tor就至少五重代理了。

title: [Bug] App is not usable when system scaling and text size are set to maximum in android settings
author: 0xRustlang
body:
Hello

Thank you for this great project.

The App is not usable when system scaling and text size are set to maximum in android settings.

Specially in Tablets that are in landscape mode.

Previous versions didn't had this issue.

I don't remember when this issue appeared but it is may be at least 6-7 months that this issue is exist if i remember correctly.

What i say that is not usable, means that the connect/disconnect button and server switch button won't shown at all specially in landscape mode, so it make the app completely unusable.

Please fix this.
Thank you very much.

title: Inclusion to f-droid.org
author: proletarius101
body:
This is an awesome app. As a maintainer of [f-droid.org](https://f-droid.org), the FOSS android app store, I want to help submit it to f-droid.org. Just want to confirm the following things with you:
- do you have no objection on we including it to f-droid?
- can you include a LICENSE file or elaborate your open source license, so we'll not have license issues?
- can you git tag your releases?
